calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Hearing Date (Default Prove Up )
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Peter Bales, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Bank of the West,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Cheryl Granger Farms, Inc., a Texas corporation, and Cheryl Granger, an individual,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $69,135.12
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,483.32
Costs: $700.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $71,318.44

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
